title: UnityImageManifest
description: Schema for Unity build toolkit Docker image manifests. One manifest per image build.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for tooling validation.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this manifest schema (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH).

contractVersion.description: Integer contract version. Incremented on breaking changes to image API or entrypoint behaviour.

imageReference.description: Fully-qualified image reference including registry, name, and tag.

imageDigest.description: OCI image digest (sha256 hash of the manifest). Set after push.

unityChangeset.description: Unity build changeset hash (from Unity download archive).

baseImageDigest.description: Digest of the upstream GameCI base image this image was built FROM.

variant.description: Image variant identifier corresponding to the Unity module set.

modules.description: List of Unity module names installed in this image.

osVersion.description: Operating system version string from the container base.

toolingVersion.description: Version of the Unity build toolkit tooling layer (entrypoint.sh and supporting scripts).

buildTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this image was built.

sourceCommit.description: Git commit SHA of the unity-build-workflows repo used to build this image.

supportedTargets.description: List of Unity BuildTarget values this image can produce.

supportedScriptingBackends.description: Scripting backends available in this image.

androidSdkVersion.description: Android API level of the SDK installed. Only set for the android variant.

androidNdkVersion.description: Android NDK version string. Only set for the android variant.

jdkVersion.description: JDK version string. Only set when a JDK is present (android variant).
